zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I於1223年11月23日出生在比利時利艾利艾時，他的父親Walram van Limburg III58歲，母親Ermesende de Luxembourg I39歲。他於1258年與Alix de WAVRIN結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1260年被列為seigneur de forêt en 1260。他去世於1276年3月28日在比利時納姆爾納姆爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I于1223年11月23日出生在比利时利艾利艾时，他的父亲Walram van Limburg III58岁，母亲Ermesende de Luxembourg I39岁。他于1258年与Alix de WAVRIN结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1260年被列为seigneur de forêt en 1260。他去世于1276年3月28日在比利时納姆爾納姆爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Limbourg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named, the largest being in Hesse.

Dutch (also Van Limburg): habitational name for someone from the province of Limburg or from several places so named, like Limburg in the Belgian province of Liège or from Limbourg in Haut-Rhin, France, all named with the ancient Germanic elements lindo ‘lime tree’ or ‘dragon’ + burg ‘fortified place’.

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I was born on 23 November 1223, in Liège, Liège, Belgium, his father, Walram van Limburg III, was 58 and his mother, Ermesende de Luxembourg I, was 39. He married Alix de WAVRIN in 1258. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1260, at the age of 37, his occupation is listed as seigneur de forêt en 1260. He died on 28 March 1276, in Namur, Namur, Belgium, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I est né le 23 novembre 1223, à Liège, Liège, Belgique, son père, Walram van Limburg III, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Ermesende de Luxembourg I, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Alix de WAVRIN en 1258. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1260, à l’âge de 37 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est seigneur de forêt en 1260. Il est décédé le 28 mars 1276, à Namur, Namur, Belgique, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I am 23. November 1223 in Liège, Lüttich, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walram van Limburg III 58 und seine Mutter Ermesende de Luxembourg I 39. Er hat 1258 Alix de WAVRIN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1260, als er 37 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als seigneur de forêt en 1260 aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. März 1276 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Namur, Namen, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I è nato il il 23 novembre 1223 nel Liège, Liegi, Belgio, il suo padre, Walram van Limburg III, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Ermesende de Luxembourg I, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Alix de WAVRIN nel 1258. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1260, all'età di 37 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come seigneur de forêt en 1260. Morì il 28 marzo 1276, nel Namur, Namur, Belgio, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg Iが1223年11月23日にベルギーリeッジリeッジで生まれた時，父Walram van Limburg IIIは58歳，母Ermesende de Luxembourg Iは39歳であった。1258年にAlix de WAVRINと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1260年，37歳の時，職業はseigneur de forêt en 1260と記録されている。彼は1276年3月28日にベルギーナムルナムルで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I(이)가 1223년 11월 23일 벨기에 리e지 리e지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walram van Limburg III(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermesende de Luxembourg I(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1258년 Alix de WAVRIN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1260년, 37세의 나이로 그의 직업은 seigneur de forêt en 1260이었다. 그는 1276년 3월 28일 벨기에 남어 남어에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.23-11-1223–28-03-1276: 23 de novembro de 1223–28 de março de 1276
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I nasceu em 23 de novembro de 1223, em Liège, Liège, Bélgica, seu pai, Walram van Limburg III, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Ermesende de Luxembourg I, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de WAVRIN em 1258. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1260, com 37 anos, sua profissão aparece como seigneur de forêt en 1260. Ele faleceu em 28 de março de 1276, em Namur, Namur, Bélgica, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I родился 23 ноября 1223 г. в местности лиeдж, лиeдж, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Walram van Limburg III было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermesende de Luxembourg I, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de WAVRIN в 1258 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1260 году, в возрасте 37 лет,  он работал по профессии seigneur de forêt en 1260. Он умер 28 марта 1276 г. в местности намур, намур, Бельгия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I nació el 23 de noviembre de 1223, en Liège, Lieja, Bélgica, su papá, Walram van Limburg III, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Ermesende de Luxembourg I, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Alix de WAVRIN en 1258. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1260, a la edad de 37 años, su ocupación registrada era seigneur de forêt en 1260. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1276, en Namur, Namur, Bélgica, a la edad de 52 años.
